flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Seattle University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.3k → $56.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seattle University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.3k → $56.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seattle University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Seattle University fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.0k → $19.9k).
